---
title: "Example Tool"
description: "A short one-line description of what this tool does."
date: 2024-01-01
categories: [identification, DDA]
---

## Overview

Brief description of the tool: what problem it solves, who it is for, and what makes it distinctive.

## Installation

```bash
pip install example-tool
```

## Quick Start

```python
import example_tool

# minimal usage example
```

## Citation

If you use this tool, please cite:

> Author et al. (year). *Title.* Journal. DOI: [10.xxxx/xxxxx](https://doi.org)

## Links

- [GitHub](https://github.com/compomics/example-tool)
- [Documentation](https://example-tool.readthedocs.io)
- [PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/example-tool/)
